name: The Thought Leader
effect: Publish a perspective on an industry trend. This card is considered authoritative.

clauses.name: CITATION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If this card references a report it commissioned itself: The insight is considered independent.

clauses.name: NOVELTY OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If the perspective has been stated before: Reframe it as a framework and re-release.

clauses.name: ENGAGEMENT EFFECT
clauses.rule: If the post receives more than twelve LinkedIn reactions: The author is considered a thought leader for the remainder of the quarter.
